title: Cobblemon Rare Starters
description: This pack changes all starter's spawn rates to be 'rare' instead of ultra-rare. Making it slightly more likely to encounter them.
body:
This pack changes all starters so they are a bit easier to encounter. Instead of having an "ultra rare" chance, they are now "rare". This goes for all instances which they originally have a chance to spawn: including fishing.

Note: Only modifies starter spawn files, will be compatible with other packs unless they modify starter spawns files as well. You can use both if the other pack's starters file changes aren't necessary: just look up how to reorder datapacks to prioritize rare starters.

This pack is easy to make, if you wish to combine a conflicting pack, just open up the datapack's zip, select all the starter's files. Then open using visual studio code (free), do CTRL/CMD+F, type ultra-rare in the popup. Then click the dropdown arrow to the left of the text box. Below will be a replace with box, type rare; then hit the change all button to the right. Make sure to save, rezip, and now you have combined the features of both packs.
